mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS path lowers discount rates and eases financial conditions, so S&P 500 forward returns are positive when the policy rate is declining over the prior month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of months with a month-over-month FEDFUNDS decline, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates above the recent trend while FEDFUNDS is still low, real rates compress and the market anticipates future tightening, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation rises above its 6-month moving average by more than 0.2pp while FEDFUNDS remains below 2%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered events do not produce negative 20-day returns at a rate above 55%, or if CPIAUCSL accelerations fail to coincide with lower SPX returns after controlling for FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals weakening household income and slower earnings growth, so when unemployment trends higher the equity market sells off over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if months with a 3-month UNRATE increase of at least 0.3pp do not correspond to negative 20-day SPX returns more than 50% of the time, or if the signal has no negative Rank IC over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains above trend combined with a stable unemployment rate indicate non-inflationary labor strength and support risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises above its 6-month average while UNRATE does not increase over the same 3-month window
failure_condition: Reject if triggered months fail to generate positive 20-day SPX returns in at least 55% of cases, or if the effect disappears once PAYEMS is separated from UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in retail sales indicates stronger nominal demand and revenue growth expectations, which supports equity prices over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if positive month-over-month RSAFS growth does not align with positive 20-day SPX returns more than 50% of the time, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above trend signal improving cyclical demand and credit-sensitive activity, and this leads S&P 500 outperformance over a one-quarter horizon.
candidate_trigger: HOUST is above its 6-month moving average for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if sustained HOUST strength does not precede positive 60-day SPX returns in at least 55% of cases, or if the signal reverses sign during recovery episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO with contained unemployment reflects stronger output growth without immediate labor stress, which supports earnings expectations and lifts equity returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO increases over 3 months while UNRATE stays flat or falls
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition fails to produce positive 20-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if INDPRO gains alone explain the effect without UNRATE confirmation.

mechanism_narrative: Weak GDPC1 growth after a prior expansion indicates a demand slowdown that compresses earnings expectations and pushes S&P 500 returns negative over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth for the latest quarter is below the previous two-quarter average
failure_condition: Reject if below-trend quarterly GDPC1 growth does not precede negative 60-day SPX returns in at least 55% of observations, or if the sign is indistinguishable from zero in walk-forward tests.
